title: RPG Style More Bosses
description: Adds a new boss and new weapons to the game. Add-on for RPG Style More Weapons
body:
**Attention!**

**This is an unfinished project in early access. It will most likely contain many bugs, so install it at your own risk. The final product will be very different from what is available now. We appreciate any support that will help speed up development.**

----------

**This mod is an add-on for [RPG Style More Weapons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpg-style-more-weapons).**  
**You can play without this mod, but you won't be able to craft weapons from drops that fall from bosses.**

**![](https://i.gyazo.com/44a0a345e88e987e69c4274887119535.png)**

----------

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/610/295/256/256/637992132011410133.png)

TO WORK NEED TO INSTALL [GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib)

----------

**For now, the mod only adds the one boss: The Exoframe**

**To enter the arena, you can find an obelisk in the world and touch it. Warning!: You will not be able to return unless you defeat the boss or die.**

**![](https://i.gyazo.com/5ad2fd7100f8b536323b7815641a3e4b.png)**

[**YouTube Video**](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PwqIGs8U9O0&t=184s)

**Late Game boss with melee attacks. We recommend enchanting your boots with feather falling and enchanting your armor with durability.**

**![](https://i.gyazo.com/07fb1c8e6eeb74469a3e903ffeb1a69c.png)**

1 - Close attack (randomly selected from two options) - punch and uppercut or 2 punches and 1 kick with the exoskeleton  
2 - Long-range attack - Charge - charges the sphere for 4 seconds and then releases energy, dealing damage over a large area. While charging, summons 4 beams from the sky onto the player  
3 - High jump and damage - knocks up targets around you when you land  
4 - Leaps forward and punches  
5 - Leaps back slightly  
6 - Creates a sphere in their hands that restores Exoframe health  
7 - Crosses arms and blocks, ignoring all incoming damage for a short time  
8 - Can randomly summon a beam onto the player with a 10% chance on any attack (passive)  
9 - When taking damage, Exoframe may cast a beam at the player with a 10% chance (passive)  
10 - Exoframe has 750 HP, but retreats if its HP falls below 100

**![](https://i.gyazo.com/62bb3c2eda8ba2eddf9f7e99df2515f6.png)**

**The mod also allows you to create new weapons in the [RPG Style More Weapons mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpg-style-more-weapons).**

**![](https://i.gyazo.com/8d2d579139ba59eaa7636974f9c392e7.png)**

----------

![](https://i.gyazo.com/645443cfd1c348c3800ef1894d2eca74.png)![](https://i.gyazo.com/a606c61f5dc0ef4d70b51c03d109fbeb.png)![](https://i.gyazo.com/b1ece6c67d0ff10a4185736b9b4fccd6.png)

----------
